title: Eye of Dreams Reforged
description: When night falls, new powers awake. Adds the Eye of Dreams to Minecraft
body:
# The Eye of Dreams
The Eye of Dreams is a head-slot item that changes how you experience the night.

When worn at night, the player enters a Dreaming state. In this state, you can move faster but cannot interact with the world, and your hunger drains more quickly.

**While Dreaming:**

- You can see other entities, but they cannot see you
- Other players are invisible to you unless they are also wearing the Eye
- If you approach another player wearing the Eye of Dreams, both of you become visible to each other.
- Phantoms have not been ported in this version.

## Obtainment
The Eye of Dreams is obtained through sleep. Each time you sleep, there is a 1 in 10 chance to receive it.
#
Supports Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).

Original fabric mod->https://modrinth.com/mod/eye_of_dreams
